summary: Iteration 12: Verified Gutenberg conversion, H1 sanitization, meta description limits (<=155 chars with complete word/punctuation), upload validation, Admin Step 5 UI (content type selector, image upload), Client Generator UI (keyword input, notes textarea, image upload), and mobile responsive layout (hamburger menu, hidden sidebar). All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified through Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: sanitize_single_h1 removes duplicate H1 tags, keeps first
Backend: sanitize_single_h1 preserves content with single H1
Backend: sanitize_single_h1 handles HTML without H1
Backend: convert_to_gutenberg_blocks creates wp:heading blocks with correct levels
Backend: convert_to_gutenberg_blocks creates wp:paragraph blocks
Backend: convert_to_gutenberg_blocks creates wp:list blocks (ordered and unordered)
Backend: convert_to_gutenberg_blocks sanitizes H1 duplicates first
Backend: generate_seo_metadata meta_description <= 155 chars
Backend: generate_seo_metadata meta_description ends with complete word and punctuation
Backend: meta_description various inputs all <= 155 chars with correct ending
Backend: Upload rejects non-image files (PDF, TXT, DOC) with 400 'Formato non supportato'
Backend: Upload rejects files > 5MB with 400
Backend: Valid JPG upload returns {id, path}
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate accepts all expected fields
Backend: Auth endpoints (admin/client login) working
Frontend Admin: Step 5 'Articolo Singolo' has 'Tipo contenuto' selector with 3 buttons
Frontend Admin: Content type buttons: Articolo, Landing Page, Pillar Page
Frontend Admin: Landing Page selection shows 'Verra pubblicato come Pagina su WordPress'
Frontend Admin: Step 5 has 'Immagini (facoltativo)' upload section
Frontend Admin: Step 5 'SEO Programmatica' has 'Tipo contenuto' dropdown
Frontend Client: Shows 'Genera Articolo SEO' title and keyword input
Frontend Client: After analysis shows 'Note aggiuntive' textarea
Frontend Client: Shows 'Immagini (facoltativo)' upload section
Frontend Client: Upload button with 'Tocca per caricare immagini'
Frontend Client: File input accepts image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp
Frontend Client: Shows 'Usa formato orizzontale. JPG, PNG, WebP - max 5MB' note
Frontend Client: Shows 'Genera Articolo Ottimizzato' button after analysis
Frontend Layout: Mobile menu hamburger button exists with data-testid='mobile-menu-btn'
Frontend Layout: Sidebar has 'hidden' class by default on mobile
Frontend Layout: Sidebar has 'lg:flex lg:static' classes for desktop visibility
Frontend Layout: Mobile header has 'lg:hidden' class (only visible on mobile)

gutenberg_conversion.convert_to_gutenberg_blocks: Creates wp:heading, wp:paragraph, wp:list blocks with correct attributes
gutenberg_conversion.sanitize_single_h1: Removes duplicate H1 tags, keeping only the first one

meta_description.ending: Always ends with complete word and punctuation (.!?:)
meta_description.truncation: Finds last sentence-ending punctuation when truncating

upload_validation.format_check: Rejects non-image files with 400 'Formato non supportato'
upload_validation.success_response: Returns {id, path, filename, size} for valid uploads

admin_step5_ui.content_type_selector: 3-button grid (Articolo, Landing Page, Pillar Page) with data-testid
admin_step5_ui.wp_message: Shows 'Post su WordPress' for Articolo, 'Pagina su WordPress' for Landing/Pillar

client_generator_ui.title: 'Genera Articolo SEO' with description
client_generator_ui.keyword_input: Keyword Target input with analyze button
client_generator_ui.after_analysis: Shows competitor count, headings count, GSC keywords

mobile_responsive.sidebar_hidden: Sidebar has 'hidden' class by default on mobile
mobile_responsive.mobile_header: 'lg:hidden' class makes header visible only on mobile

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data after POST /api/seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all 5 new features: 1) Gutenberg block conversion with wp:heading, wp:paragraph blocks, 2) H1 sanitization removes duplicates, 3) Meta description <=155 chars ending with complete word/punctuation, 4) Upload endpoint validation (format + size), 5) Admin and Client UI elements for content type and image upload. Mobile responsive layout with hamburger menu and hidden sidebar verified. All backend helper function tests pass. Frontend elements accessible via data-testid selectors. GSC integration showing 9 keywords in client generator.
